sourcePrompt: An NVA earthen bunker, a buried timber-and-earth strongpoint about five meters across that barely rises a meter above grade. A low rounded mound of packed earth over a log roof, a wide dark horizontal firing slit facing front between timber lintels, and a small log-framed crawl entrance at the rear flanked by a few sandbags. Raw earth, rough. Low-poly, blocky, modular; simple readable silhouette.
